build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build && ls -la dist/

deploy.startCommand: echo '--- /app contents ---' && ls -la /app/ && echo '--- /app/dist contents ---' && ls -la /app/dist/ 2>&1 || echo 'NO DIST FOLDER'; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 0001_init 2>&1 || true; npx prisma migrate deploy 2>&1 || true; node /app/dist/main
